title: Excalibur | Clarent Edition
description:
Clarent preserves the Excalibur experience by backporting features, fixing bugs, and maintaining compatibility across Minecraft versions.

As Excalibur forges ahead, Clarent preserves the past.
body:
![Clarent Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4665160158b546d02ae74410002e26262c45cce.png)

As Excalibur forges ahead, Clarent preserves the past.

--- **Clarent** is a lightweight unofficial patch for Maffhew’s Excalibur. Clarent preserves the Excalibur experience by backporting features, fixing bugs, and maintaining compatibility across Minecraft versions. It also serves as the foundation of *The Round Table* — a growing collection of modular expansions that enhance and extend Excalibur’s reach. --- ## ![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be985295c2a2d2c0613c75a0adedb9bad4b3b3b1.png) What Clarent Brings to Your Adventure ### ![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a489900d9108e0b27130dcfb35769244ca565091.png) Compatibility - Full support for **Excalibur 1.21.10** <-- Use this one!! - Works with **Minecraft 1.19.2 – 1.21.11** - Compatible with **Excalibur | Fresh Animations**
Recent Bug Fixes - Improved Wool & Banner blending - Full backport support - Maffhew has squished just about every bug! - *and more* > *If you spot an issue, reporting it helps keep Clarent polished and strong!*
Mod Support Clarent includes compatibility patches for many popular mods: - **Better Mod List** - **Cherished Worlds** - **Dynamic Trees** - *minor compatibility fix* - **Eating Animation** - **Extended Drawers** - **Fabric Skyboxes** - **Falling Leaves** - **Guard Villagers** - Based on textures by TimothyWiggins - **Inventory Management** - **Jade** - **LambdaBetterGrass** - Grassy Blocks and Fences - **RP Renames** - **Subtle Effects** - **Xaero’s Minimap / World Map** - *and more* > ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60f882e259dc6c0628f2f42f8b7eb0a12e99144.png) *Mod support may vary slightly depending on Minecraft version and mod updates.*
--- ## ![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0074de6e296ae110694b55ed238deffb36b96e9.png) Clarent Load Order 💡 **Recommended Load Order for Best Compatibility:** 1. **Excalibur** 2. **Excalibur | Clarent Edition** *(required)* 3. *(Any other optional packs should load above Clarent.)* > ![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60f882e259dc6c0628f2f42f8b7eb0a12e99144.png) **Important:** > - **Clarent must load directly above Excalibur.** > - **Other addons should load above Clarent.** ---
About The Round Table <- Development delayed due to time constraints. **The Round Table** is a gathering of resource packs crafted around **Excalibur** and expanded by **GrandPappyJay**, offering broader version compatibility, additional visual variants, and small touches of expansion — all designed to stay true to the heart of Excalibur’s world. | Minecraft Version | [Clarent](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clarent) | Echoes | [EFA Patch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excalibur-fresh-animations) | Intended for use with... | |:------------------|:--------|:--------------------|:-----------------------|:---------| | 1.19.2 – 1.19.2 | 12110_1192_v1 | *Discord* | 215.4.a | Excalibur 1.21.10 + Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | 1.19.4 – 1.19.4 | 12110_1194_v1 | *Discord* | 215.4.a | Excalibur 1.21.10 + Fresh Animations 1.9.2 | | 1.20.0 – 1.20.1 | 12110_1201_v3 | *Discord* | 1.10.3 | Excalibur 1.21.10 + Fresh Animations 1.10.3 | | 1.20.2 – 1.21.11 | 12110_1202+_v3 | *Discord* | 1.10.3 | Excalibur 1.21.10 + Fresh Animations 1.10.3 | > Development versions of *Excalibur | Echoes Through Time* are available in Discord for testing while development continues. > ClarentMod in development (More Excalibur based features). > Due to time commitments, Excalibur | Fresh Animations development has fallen behind.
---
Pack Versioning Explained Each download now follows this structure: [ Excalibur Release Version ] . [ MC Support Range ] . [ Pack Build ] Example: Clarent_`12110_1201_v3`.zip | Part | Meaning | Example | |:-----|:--------|:--------| | `12110` | Excalibur Version Supported | **Excalibur 1.21.10** | | `1201` | Compatibility Variant | Supported MC Versions | | `v3` | Clarent Build Number | First full release for this Excalibur version |
--- ## ![Community Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a850b4352ea2143a6b66f528118a6adb3c6294fd.png) Excalibur Community & Contributors ### ![Invite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/453606ca4b361cb344af3f82b0636cc06afbc8ef.png) Join the Community Have a bug to report? An idea to share? Or just want to chat about Excalibur? [Join the Official Excalibur Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qYZ9Pen) > ![Map](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2bdbe237044aa18651d9cbf95f8c2eda5803cba.png) *Adventure awaits — and every voice shapes the journey!* --- ### ![Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be985295c2a2d2c0613c75a0adedb9bad4b3b3b1.png) Credits Special thanks to the amazing creators who made this addon possible: - **[Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew)** – Creator of *Excalibur* - **TrinalDust** – Inspiration and help in getting the project started --- ### ![Discover More](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebbf723731a43e74defbc96665ae3f994561efc4.png) Discover More Excalibur Creations Love Excalibur? Explore more creations inspired by its world: | Creator | Modrinth | CurseForge | |---------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------| | Maffhew | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/maffhew/projects) | | GrandPappyJay | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/GrandPappyJay) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/grandpappyjay/projects) | | TeeCee | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/TeeCee) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tc_/projects) | | Ruseki_ | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Ruseki_) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ruseki/projects) | | _Aetheris | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/_Aetheris) | — | | stradat | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/stradat) | — | | Otacon21 | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Otacon21) | — | | patpuck | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/patpuck) | — | | kamas55282963 | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/kamas55282963) | — | | oni7suKa | — | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/oni7suka/projects) | | Starlezz | — | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/starlezz/projects) | | MPsantos20 | — | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mpsantos20/projects) | --- ## ![Licensing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3410e04c261c28c37ab5a4504882383b93a43427.png) Licensing *Excalibur | Clarent Edition* is a **fan-made patch**, distributed under the terms of Excalibur’s license. > **In accordance with Excalibur's licensing:** > > -
